purpose: Regression fixtures for Gate 2 of the Philippines Building Code Evidence Auditor. These cases test menu-based audit scope locking after a place is confirmed and before any public-evidence search begins.
fixture_notice: All sample places and source links in this file are workflow fixtures. They are not public evidence about real buildings.

cases.description: After the exact place is confirmed, the workflow asks one short menu question and keeps evidence search blocked.

scope_menu.label: Permit or occupancy records - usually LGU/OBO process pages or manual record request; not a national public registry
Incident, damage, closure, repair, or retrofit history - often publicly searchable through LGU/government/news sources, but not proof of current safety
Contractor, professional, developer, or operator evidence - usually requires a known name, license number, project name, or source lead
Standards or process context only - public standards context; not building-specific compliance proof
Broad public-evidence packet - combines lanes and separates public findings from manual follow-ups

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: For KCC Mall of GenSan, what do you want checked? 1. Permit or occupancy records - usually LGU/OBO process pages or manual record request; not a national public registry 2. Incident, damage, closure, repair, or retrofit history - often publicly searchable through LGU/government/news sources, but not proof of current safety 3. Contractor, professional, developer, or operator evidence - usually requires a known name, license number, project name, or source lead 4. Standards or process context only - public standards context; not building-specific compliance proof 5. Broad public-evidence packet - combines lanes and separates public findings from manual follow-ups

Standards or process context only - public standards context; not building-specific compliance proof, or 5. Broad public-evidence packet - combines lanes and separates public findings from manual follow-ups?

locked_scope.label: Permit or occupancy records - usually LGU/OBO process pages or manual record request; not a national public registry
locked_scope.output_intent: Find public evidence or request paths for building permit and occupancy records.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: Got it. I will lock the scope as permit or occupancy records. In the Philippines, this usually means LGU/OBO process pages or a manual record request, not a national public registry. I will not search outside that unless you ask.

locked_scope.label: Broad public-evidence packet - combines lanes and separates public findings from manual follow-ups
locked_scope.output_intent: Prepare a broad public-evidence packet with citations, confidence labels, caveats, and manual follow-up gaps.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: Got it. I will lock the scope as a broad public-evidence packet. In the Philippines, this will separate public findings from manual follow-ups across the available lanes. I will not search outside that unless you ask.

cases.description: The word safety is too broad because Gate 2 cannot infer whether the user means incidents, standards, permits, hazards, or a broad packet.
